review_summary: Plan is well-aligned with all 4 user requirements. One must-fix: reviewer agents have tools: edit: false which blocks file writes regardless of permission scoping.

issues.title: Agent tools: edit: false blocks file writes regardless of permission scoping
issues.description: plan-reviewer.md has tools: edit: false. Task 5 only updates permission section but the tool is disabled entirely.
issues.suggested_fix: Also update tools section: edit: true. The scoped permission.edit block enforces path restrictions.

issues.title: Prose path references in skill files not addressed by Task 4
issues.suggested_fix: Also update prose description lines referencing old ~/.sentinal/ paths.

issues.title: deepMergeAdditive is non-exported but Task 6 requires unit testing it
issues.suggested_fix: Export it or extract to src/cli/utils/deep-merge.ts.

issues.title: Task 2 DoD doesn't cover cleanup of docs/plans/*.json patterns
